title: Pasania sundaica
taxonomy: Pasania sundaica is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. This species is part of the genus Pasania, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The Lauraceae family is a large and diverse group of evergreen trees and shrubs commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Pasania sundaica is specifically found in Indonesia, where it grows in the Sundaland region. It is a part of the larger classification of plants within the kingdom Plantae.

intro: Pasania sundaica, also known as Pasania, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
